title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay! It's about time I cut the lamb and seasoned it for-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Where is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's gone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Which one of you did it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who took the Lamb I had in the pantry?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What're you talkin' about? Don't look at us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Are you sure you really looked?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes! It's Van-ished!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Van- ished?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you saying it grew legs and walked off?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Procuring ingredients is a basic skill for a chef.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If you can't manage even that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're going to income- nience an important customer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's right! If I don't start cooking the lamb soon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it won't be done in time to serve as the entree!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Might as well go beg forgiveness now, eh? Get it over with!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: EAH HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HAU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now what? Should I use beef as a substi- tute? Pork?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I can't! I chose all the seasonings to pair with the Red Ram's unique flavor profile.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use any other meat and the whole dish will taste off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heh heh. Head chef Zef isn't so forgiving that he'll allow you to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Serve some dish you ad-libbed on the fly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Give up and hoist the white flag!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We aren't out of red Ram meat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still have a whole carcass in there.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
